extracted_items.content: Main GitHub organization for work is github.com/acme-corp. All repositories live under this organization.
Primary programming language across the organization is Python. TypeScript is used for frontend only.
Always run tests after making code changes without being asked. Do not skip tests.
Commit messages must follow conventional commits format: type(scope): message. Types include feat, fix, chore, docs, refactor, test. Always include scope in parentheses.
Staging environment is at staging.acme-corp.com with a separate database. Production is at acme-corp.com. Never mix or cross-contaminate staging and production databases.
Prefer short, direct responses. Use bullet points only when there are 3 or more items. No preamble.
On-call rotation cycle is every 2 weeks. Slack channel for platform alerts is #platform-alerts.
When asked to review code, check in this priority order: security issues first, then correctness, then style.
